sql_array: CREATE TABLE ldap_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_dn VARCHAR(255), search_criteria VARCHAR(255), result_count INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ldap_test VALUES (1, 'cn=John Doe,dc=example,dc=com', '(uid=jd*)', NULL);
INSERT INTO ldap_test VALUES (2, 'cn=Jane Smith,dc=example,dc=com', '(mail=jane*example.com)', NULL);
UPDATE ldap_test SET result_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ldap_search('ldap://localhost', 0, 'dc=example,dc=com', user_dn, NULL) * 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, user_dn, ldap_search('ldap://localhost', 0, 'dc=example,dc=com', search_criteria, NULL) * 1.5 AS adjusted_results FROM ldap_test WHERE result_count IS NULL;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ldap_search('ldap://localhost', 0, 'dc=example,dc=com', '(ou=Users)', NULL) * 2) AS total_users FROM ldap_test GROUP BY id HAVING total_users > 0;

SELECT ld.id, ld.user_dn, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ldap_search('ldap://localhost', 0, 'dc=example,dc=com', ld.search_criteria, NULL)) AS search_results FROM ldap_test ld WHERE search_criteria IS NOT NULL ORDER BY search_results DESC;
INSERT INTO ldap_test VALUES (3, 'cn=Test User,dc=example,dc=com', '(cn=*)', NULL);
UPDATE ldap_test SET result_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ldap_search('ldap://localhost', 0, 'dc=example,dc=com', '(cn=nonexistent)', NULL)) WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, user_dn, COALESCE(result_count, 0) * 100 AS scaled_results FROM ldap_test WHERE COALESCE(result_count, 0) > 0;
